title: Bosch 1x EXPERT CYL-9 Multi Construction Drill Bit (for Concrete, Soft tiles, Ø 6.50 mm, Professional Accessory Impact Drill/Driver, Rotary Drill/Drivers)
features: Up to 5x more precise than a Bosch CYL-3 Drill Bit
Accurate drilling is easier with Bosch Centering Geometry
Cylindrical shank compatible with three-jaw drill chucks
Ideal for drilling holes into multiple materials; can be used in impact mode on concrete and stone, and on rotary setting for brick, soft ceramic tile, sheet metal, wood and plastic
Scope of delivery: Bosch EXPERT CYL-9 MultiConstruction Drill Bit 6.5 x 200 x 250 mm
description: Up to 5x more precise than a Bosch CYL-3 Drill Bit - The modern construction site requires working on many different materials and you never know what you will need to drill next. Finding the right drill bit can be difficult and time-consuming – unless you have the EXPERT MultiConstruction Drill Bit. This highly versatile drill bit can drill accurately into hard materials, such as granite, without skidding – thanks to its sharp tip and advanced geometric design. Made from optimised carbide using our fine grinding manufacturing technique, it can also tackle concrete, brick, soft tile, wood and metal. It can always do a professional job – whatever the material. The Bosch EXPERT CYL-9 MultiConstruction Cylindrical Drill Bit is the one drill bit that should always be in your toolbox: you'll never get stuck on a job or waste time looking for the right bit. Cylindrical shank compatible with three-jaw drill chucks
